titleStmt.title: Letter from Andrew Philip Magill to Thomas Francis Smyth, 29 March 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Andrew Philip Magill

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: This is a letter from Andrew Philip Magill (1871-1941), the private secretary of the Chief Secretary of Ireland, Augustine Birrell (1850-1933). Magill was writing to Thomas Francis Smyth (1875-1937), MP for South Leitrim. In the letter Magill was writing on behalf of Birrell stating that, Birrell had received Farrell's letter of recommendation and had taken it on board. Smyth had sent Birrell a letter asking him to consider Mr Thomas W. Delany (1868-1939) for the position of chief crown solicitor of Ireland. A vacancy had arose when Sir Malachy Kelly (1851-1916) died suddenly. Delany was the crown solicitor for Longford.

msIdentifier.collection: Chief Secretary's Office Registered Papers; CSO RP/1916/6258/9

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
Copy 29th March, 1916. Dear Mr. Smyth, I am desired by Mr. Birrell to acknowledge the
receipt of your letter of 27th instant, and to
say that he has taken note of your recommendation
of Mr.Delaney for appointment as Chief Crown Solicitor,
Ireland. Yours faithfully, (sd) APM
Under Secy.
A.P.M.
29/3/16 Thomas F. Smyth, Esq., M.P.,
Mohill,
Co.Leitrim.
